titles.en: Chapter on Sustaining Blessings Through Bearing Financial Burdens
Chapter on Sustaining Blessings Through Bearing Financial Burdens

segments: 1705 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَنْ عَظُمَتْ نِعْمَةُ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اِشْتَدَّتْ مَئُونَةُ اَلنَّاسِ عَلَيْهِ فَاسْتَدِيمُوا اَلنِّعْمَةَ بِاحْتِمَالِ اَلْمَئُونَةِ وَ لاَ تَعْرِضُوهَا لِلزَّوَالِ فَقَلَّ مَنْ زَالَتْ عَنْهُ اَلنِّعْمَةُ فَكَادَتْ تَعُودُ إِلَيْهِ ».
arabic.text: 1705 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَنْ عَظُمَتْ نِعْمَةُ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اِشْتَدَّتْ مَئُونَةُ اَلنَّاسِ عَلَيْهِ فَاسْتَدِيمُوا اَلنِّعْمَةَ بِاحْتِمَالِ اَلْمَئُونَةِ وَ لاَ تَعْرِضُوهَا لِلزَّوَالِ فَقَلَّ مَنْ زَالَتْ عَنْهُ اَلنِّعْمَةُ فَكَادَتْ تَعُودُ إِلَيْهِ ».

segments: Hadith.1705 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Whoever is granted great blessings by Allah (swt) will also face greater responsibilities from others. Preserve the blessings by enduring these responsibilities and do not expose them to loss. Rarely does one lose blessings only to have them return."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.1705 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Whoever is granted great blessings by Allah (swt) will also face greater responsibilities from others. Preserve the blessings by enduring these responsibilities and do not expose them to loss. Rarely does one lose blessings only to have them return."

titles.en: Chapter on Sustaining Blessings Through Bearing Financial Burdens

segments: عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَحْسِنُوا جِوَارَ نِعَمِ اَللَّهِ وَ اِحْذَرُوا أَنْ تَنْتَقِلَ عَنْكُمْ إِلَى غَيْرِكُمْ أَمَا إِنَّهَا لَنْ تَنْتَقِلَ عَنْ أَحَدٍ قَطُّ فَكَادَتْ تَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِ وَ كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ «قَلَّ مَا أَدْبَرَ شَيْءٌ فَأَقْبَلَ» ».
arabic.text: عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَحْسِنُوا جِوَارَ نِعَمِ اَللَّهِ وَ اِحْذَرُوا أَنْ تَنْتَقِلَ عَنْكُمْ إِلَى غَيْرِكُمْ أَمَا إِنَّهَا لَنْ تَنْتَقِلَ عَنْ أَحَدٍ قَطُّ فَكَادَتْ تَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِ وَ كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ «قَلَّ مَا أَدْبَرَ شَيْءٌ فَأَقْبَلَ» ».

segments:
Hadith.1706 - Imam (as) said: "Be kind in your dealings with Allah’s (swt) blessings, and beware of them being transferred from you to others. Indeed, once blessings leave someone, they rarely return to them."
And Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) used to say: "Rarely does something that departs come back again."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1706 - Imam (as) said: "Be kind in your dealings with Allah’s (swt) blessings, and beware of them being transferred from you to others. Indeed, once blessings leave someone, they rarely return to them."
And Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) used to say: "Rarely does something that departs come back again."
